ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year the company went public (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the price belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price */,
  "price_high" REAL /* Highest stock price for the day */,
  "price_low" REAL /* Lowest stock price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "quarter_end" TEXT /* Quarter end date of the metric */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets (ROA) */,
  "book_value_of_equity_per_share" REAL /* Book value of equity per share */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "price_to_book_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_statements" (
  "cash_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the statement belongs to */,
  "quarter_end" TEXT /* Quarter end date of the statement */,
  "cash_from_operating_activities" REAL /* Cash from operating activities */,
  "cash_from_investing_activities" REAL /* Cash from investing activities */,
  "cash_from_financing_activities" REAL /* Cash from financing activities */,
  "cash_change_during_period" REAL /* Cash change during the period */,
  "capital_expenditures" REAL /* Capital expenditures */,
  "dividends_paid" REAL /* Dividends paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flow_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statements" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the statement belongs to */,
  "quarter_end" TEXT /* Quarter end date of the statement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "eps_basic" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) - basic */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) - diluted */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income */,
  "interest_expense" REAL /* Interest expense */,
  "tax_provision" REAL /* Tax provision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, financial advisor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data viewed (e.g., financial reports, stock prices) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the article is related to */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the rating is for */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was published */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who provided the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
